TimeEntry.Title: ND- Set the email bulk complaint level (BCL) threshold to be 6 or lower
TimeEntry.Notes: Set Email BCL threshold to 6

TimeEntry.Title: ND - Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Block users who reached the message limit
TimeEntry.Notes: Set message limit action as "restrict user from sending emails"

TimeEntry.Title: ND- Unimplemented Microsoft Control: Ensure that no sender domains are allowed for anti-spam policies
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed and Ensure no Sender Domains in Block list in Anti-Spam policy

TimeEntry.Title: ND- Ensure 'External sharing' of calendars is not available
TimeEntry.Notes: Turned of External Sharing of Calendars

TimeEntry.Title: Restrict anonymous users from joining meetings
TimeEntry.Notes: Restricted Anonymous Users from joining the meetings

TimeEntry.Title: Check old laptops and prep for Win 11 upgrade.
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked on new laptop for Ryan. Found that it was running Win 10 and in need of wipe. Brought back a total of 3 laptops for Win 11 remediation. Apply BIOS update for Pon's PC.
